originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&val` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP true))
model:
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: No ERROR comment and no TRUE (known) record for b62bd7b261b.c — all true positives are new bugs. val is assigned at L16 (val = (s && s[1]) ? s+1 : NULL) but is never subsequently read in the function — a genuine dead store. This is the same bug as PRODUCT_7 (TRUE_NEW, val dead at L16) which correctly has PC = CONF AND RENAME (covering both REGEXP=T and REGEXP=F). PRODUCT_50 additionally constrains to REGEXP=T, but the dead store at L16 also occurs when REGEXP=F (val is assigned at L16 and no code after uses it in the \!REGEXP path). The PC is over-constrained (too narrow).
